info.description: Articles on /learn. Each has a card image, hero image, intro, and sub-sections.

slug.description: Web address for the article (the part after /learn/).

publishedLabel.description: Date label shown on the article, e.g. 'Published June 29, 2026'.

excerpt.description: Short summary shown on the card (optional).

cardImage.description: Image shown on the article card in lists and grids.

heroImage.description: Large image at the top of the article page (defaults to the card image).

body.description: Opening paragraph(s). Separate paragraphs with a blank line.

sections.description: The body sub-sections, each with a sub-heading and paragraphs.

order.description: Display order in lists (lower numbers show first).
